metadata.description: Maps each deduplicated threat to its discovering Phase B specialists for confidence analysis

TECH-H001.title: transferFrom Fee Deduction Bypasses ERC20 Allowance, Draining Sender Beyond Approval
TECH-H001.duplicate_group_description: transferFrom fee deduction bypasses ERC20 allowance — _payTxFee deducts fees from sender's balance via _update() before super.transferFrom checks/consumes allowance, allowing spender to extract amount + fee while only needing amount in allowance

TECH-H002.title: Forwarder Accepts Arbitrary Domain Separator Enabling Cross-Contract/Cross-Chain Signature Replay
TECH-H002.duplicate_group_description: Forwarder accepts arbitrary caller-supplied domainSeparator enabling cross-contract and cross-chain EIP-712 signature replay

TECH-H003.title: Revoked Controller Can Re-Enable Safety Switch Despite Role Removal
TECH-H003.duplicate_group_description: Revoked controller can re-enable safety switch — safetySwitch re-enable path checks _operatingController == _msgSender() without verifying caller still holds CONTROLLER role

ECON-H005.title: Mint and Burn Operations Bypass Pause and Blacklist Enforcement
ECON-H005.duplicate_group_description: Mint and burn operations bypass pause and blacklist checks — mint() and burn() only check _operating flag and roles, not adminSanity/paused()/isBlacklisted()

TECH-H004.title: MASTER_MINTER With MINTER_ROLE Gets Unexpectedly Constrained by Minter Allowance
TECH-H004.duplicate_group_description: MASTER_MINTER unexpectedly constrained by MINTER_ROLE allowance when holding both roles — mint() checks hasRole(MINTER_ROLE) independently without excluding MASTER_MINTER

TECH-H005.title: Phantom Fee Requirement Blocks Transfers When feesFaucet Is address(0) But Fee Rate Is Non-Zero
TECH-H005.duplicate_group_description: Phantom fee requirement blocks transfers when _feesFaucet is address(0) but _txfeeRate > 0 — balance check is unconditional but fee deduction is conditional on feesFaucet being set

ECON-H002.title: Shared Nonce Space Between permit() and transferWithAuthorization() Causes Cross-Function Invalidation
ECON-H002.duplicate_group_description: Shared nonce pool between permit() and transferWithAuthorization() enables cross-function signature invalidation via _useNonce sharing

TECH-H007.title: Forwarder verify() and execute() Have Inconsistent Validation Allowing Misleading Off-Chain Checks
TECH-H007.duplicate_group_description: Forwarder verify() and execute() have inconsistent validation — verify() omits req.to == _eurfAddress check that execute() enforces, misleading relayers

ECON-H018.title: Blacklisted Admin Can Evade Sanctions and Transfer Funds
ECON-H018.duplicate_group_description: Admin role bypasses pause and sender blacklist in adminSanity() — compromised or blacklisted admin can still transfer tokens during emergency

ECON-H006.title: setOwner Can Leave Hidden Extra OWNER Role Holders Due to EnumerableSet Assumptions
ECON-H006.duplicate_group_description: setOwner brittle EnumerableSet logic — revokes OWNER from getRoleMember(OWNER, 0) which may not be the correct address when multiple owners exist

OPS-H015.title: Unprivileged fee-free token movements while paused/blacklisted via payGaslessBasefee bypass of adminSanity
OPS-H015.duplicate_group_description: payGaslessBasefee bypasses pause and blacklist compliance checks — direct _update call without adminSanity when called by trusted forwarder

OPS-H008.title: __ERC20ControlerMinter_init Declared Public Instead of Internal Risks State Reset During Upgrades
OPS-H008.duplicate_group_description: Public __ERC20ControlerMinter_init allows state reset during initialization contexts — declared public instead of internal, could reset token metadata and role grants during upgrades

TECH-H013.title: Unrestricted role-management entrypoints may allow any DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE holder to self-escalate into CONTROLLER/MINTER power without intended separation-of-duties
TECH-H013.duplicate_group_description: Role management functions (addController/removeController/addMinter/removeMinter/setMasterMinter) lack explicit access control modifiers — rely on internal grantRole/revokeRole checks which could be undermined by misconfiguration

ECON-H017.title: Fee Avoidance via Dust Transfer Splitting
ECON-H017.duplicate_group_description: Fee avoidance via dust transfer splitting — integer division in calculateTxFee truncates fee to zero for small amounts, enabling systematic fee evasion

OPS-H014.title: Unrestricted setOwner() lets any caller seize DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE (upgrade/role takeover)
OPS-H014.duplicate_group_description: setOwner() lacks explicit onlyRole modifier — relies on internal grantRole/revokeRole auth which could be bypassed under misconfiguration or role admin changes

TECH-H006.title: Shared Nonce Pool Between permit() and transferWithAuthorization() Enables Cross-Function Invalidation

TECH-H008.title: mint() and burn() Bypass Pause and Blacklist Checks Allowing Supply Manipulation During Emergency

TECH-H009.title: setOwner May Revoke Wrong Address If Multiple OWNER Role Members Exist

TECH-H010.title: payGaslessBasefee Bypasses Pause and Blacklist Checks Allowing Token Movement During Emergency

TECH-H011.title: Blacklisted ADMIN Can Bypass Sender Blacklist and Pause via adminSanity Exemption

TECH-H012.title: __ERC20ControlerMinter_init Has Public Visibility Instead of Internal

TECH-H014.title: Forwarder allows arbitrary ETH forwarding to EURF token address via req.value, potentially enabling ETH griefing/loss and unexpected ETH custody semantics

TECH-H015.title: Forwarder.verify() may mislead relayers by omitting critical execute-time constraints, enabling systematic relayer griefing

TECH-H016.title: Public initializer-like functions with onlyInitializing may be reachable during nested initialization, enabling state/role resets in complex deployments

TECH-H017.title: FeesHandlerUpgradeable base setters are publicly callable in inheritors that forget to override, enabling permissionless fee parameter hijack

TECH-H018.title: Upgradeable storage-layout fragility due to multiple inheritance and missing __gap fields in several base modules may enable state corruption after upgrades

TECH-H019.title: Enumerable role-member indexing assumptions can break owner/admin rotation if role member sets contain multiple members
